title: nototriche megalorrhiza
intro: Nototriche megalorrhiza, also known as the large-flowered nototriche, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It has been found to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Nototriche megalorrhiza is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
